summary: Product page for the Cavallo Trek PRO Hoof Boot (sold per single boot), an upgraded Trek model with a moulded TPU Pro Mesh upper for round hooves, sizes 1-4.
Gravity Form page for submitting donation and sponsorship requests to Cavallo. No body content beyond the form.
Promotional landing page for the Cavallo Revolution volume discount offering up to 25% off boots plus free shipping, with customer testimonials and video.
June 2024 Cavallo newsletter covering barefoot hoof research by Sarah Albanozzo on hoof capability of barefoot-kept horses, with related updates and video.
Informational page on Cavallo hoofcare cost savings, comparing traditional metal shoeing expenses to going barefoot with Cavallo Hoof Boots.
Informational page on using Cavallo Hoof Boots for Navicular syndrome support and rehabilitation, covering symptoms, treatments, and shock-absorption benefits.
Informational page on Cavallo Hoof Boots durability and lifespan, covering factors affecting wear, maintenance tips, the 180-day warranty, and when to replace.
Informational page on the secure fit of Cavallo Hoof Boots, explaining the conical shape, Velcro closure, drainage system, and fit customization across terrain.
Informational page on the many uses of Cavallo Hoof Boots, including therapy, rehabilitation, trail riding, transport, performance disciplines, and turnout.
Affiliate Area account dashboard page with no body content; functional page for logged-in affiliates.
Affiliate login page with a prompt to log into the affiliate account and a contact link for assistance.
Affiliate registration page with a contact link for assistance with signing up for the Cavallo affiliate program.
